definition: Service Organization Control Type II — an auditing standard that evaluates a service provider's controls related to security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy.
extendedDefinition: Service Organization Control Type II — an auditing standard that evaluates a service provider's controls related to security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy.
description: SOC 2. Service Organization Control Type II — an auditing standard that evaluates a service provider's controls related to security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy.
